fields.current_price: number, digits only — the current selling price after any discount
fields.original_price: number, digits only — the list/strikethrough price before discount; null if none
fields.currency: the currency code shown, e.g. USD; null if not shown
fields.in_stock: true if the product can be purchased now, false if sold out or unavailable
fields.product_url: the canonical URL of this product page
fields.seller: the seller or retailer name if shown; null otherwise
